summary: Completed testing of clickable country selector in Navbar and backend country_code filter. All tests passed - country indicator is clickable with popover dropdown, search bar works, country selection updates indicator and persists in localStorage, and business search correctly filters by country_code.
passed_tests: Navbar: Country indicator clickable with data-testid='country-indicator' - PASSED
Navbar: ChevronDown icon visible next to country code - PASSED
Navbar: Popover opens with search bar (data-testid='navbar-country-search') - PASSED
Navbar: Header 'Explorar negocios en:' visible in dropdown - PASSED
Navbar: Search filter works (typing 'Mexico' shows Mexico option) - PASSED
Navbar: Selecting Colombia updates indicator to CO flag - PASSED
Navbar: Current country shows checkmark in dropdown list - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses?country_code=MX returns 5 Mexican businesses - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses?country_code=JP returns 0 businesses (empty) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses?country_code=CO returns 0 businesses (pending status) - PASSED
Backend: country_code filter is case insensitive (MX == mx) - PASSED
Backend: Business response includes country_code field - PASSED
Search page: Changing country to MX shows 5 resultados - PASSED
Search page: Changing country to JP shows 'No encontramos resultados' - PASSED
Persistence: Country saved in localStorage key 'bookvia_browsing_country' - PASSED
Persistence: Manual selection flag saved in 'bookvia_browsing_country_manual' - PASSED
Persistence: Country persists across page reload - PASSED
Persistence: Country persists across navigation to /search - PASSED
Persistence: Country persists across navigation to /categories - PASSED
No JavaScript console errors detected - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: CountryContext implementation is well-structured with proper localStorage persistence
Navbar Popover uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
SearchPage correctly uses useCountry() hook and passes country_code to API
Backend search_businesses endpoint properly filters by country_code.upper()
test_credentials: No credentials needed - tested public pages only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Country selector in Navbar is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) Country indicator uses data-testid='country-indicator' and opens a Popover on click, (2) Each country option has data-testid='nav-country-{CODE}' (e.g., 'nav-country-MX'), (3) Search bar has data-testid='navbar-country-search', (4) CountryContext stores selected country in localStorage key 'bookvia_browsing_country', (5) Manual selection sets 'bookvia_browsing_country_manual' flag to prevent auto-detection override, (6) SearchPage uses useCountry() hook and passes country_code to businessesAPI.search(), (7) Backend GET /api/businesses accepts country_code query param and filters by country_code.upper().
